steps.title: Look for an increase
steps.content: The researcher needs an example of a lake whose ice duration increased. That means the lake must have more days of ice in 2005-06 than it had in 1980-81.

steps.title: Avoid one-year comparisons
steps.content: A wrongly includes Kalmarinjarvi, which did not increase. C and D give single-year facts rather than showing growth over time. The remaining choice identifies a lake with more ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81. The answer is B.
